arts.ttl: Lucas Vázquez names Real Madrid teammate who does ‘everything’ after victory over Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Lucas Vázquez has on Sunday moved to lavish praise on teammate Jude Bellingham. This comes owing to the Englishman’s standout performance in the club’s meeting with Girona.…

arts.ttl: Report: Mohamed Salah receives 'opening contract offer' from Liverpool
arts.sum: A major update in Mohamed Salah's protracted contract negotiations with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits he is 'gutted' after missing a crucial chance to close the gap on Liverpool... but insists Arsenal were 'really strong and dominant' during 1-1 draw with Fulham
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT CRAVEN COTTAGE: Bukayo Saka thought he had earned the Gunners all three points after heading in Gabriel Martinelli's cross two minutes from time. But the goal was disallowed.

arts.ttl: Arteta: We really wanted to put pressure on Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal missed out on closing their gap to Premier League leaders Liverpool to four points as they drew at Fulham on Sunday. Their draw at Craven Cottage coupled with Chelsea's 4-3 win at Tottenham Hotspur means Arsenal are third, six points behind Liverpool, who have a match in hand after the Merseyside derby scheduled for Saturday was postponed due to bad weather.

arts.ttl: Liverpool submit contract offer to Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Liverpool have made an offer to Mohamed Salah to extend his contract at Anfield beyond the summer. Salah’s future has been up in the air with his deal set to expire at the end of the current campaign. The 32-year-old revealed last month that he had not received the proposal of an extension and expressed […] The post Liverpool submit contract offer to Mohamed Salah first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson Liverpool prediction comes back to haunt him after Arsenal controversy
arts.sum: Liverpool's title rivals Arsenal and Manchester City missed out on the chance to close the gap on Arne Slot's side after dropping points this weekend.

arts.ttl: ‘Incredible, amazing’ – Kylian Mbappé hails Real Madrid teammate after victory over Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has moved to reveal his appreciation for the talents of a fellow member of Carlo Ancelotti’s squad. The player in question? Jude Bellingham. Midfielder Bellingham…

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham sends message to Real Madrid teammate Modrić after Girona masterclass
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has taken to social media, to reveal his appreciation for the latest efforts of teammate and midfield partner Luka Modrić. This comes after Modrić was…

arts.ttl: Where Arsenal must find more consistency if they are going to chase down Liverpool in the title race, writes ISAAN KHAN after the Gunners' disappointing 1-1 draw with Fulham
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: It was - you guessed it - a corner-kick which clawed Arsenal back into the match against Fulham , and earned the visitors a point.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard fires defiant Liverpool message as Arsenal title race takes fresh twist
arts.sum: Liverpool were not in action due to the impact of Storm Darragh, but it was a successful weekend for them as Manchester City and Arsenal dropped points.
